nodes.text: Address. Seventeen Pembrook Drive. It's the house — I've been there twelve years. My practice is about six blocks away. I walk when the weather's good. Which is not today.
No. Twelve years, same house. My kids grew up there. It's documented as my address with the medical board, the hospital, the practice — everything. Seventeen Pembrook Drive.
Thank you. I hope you'll reconsider. I've explained the situation as clearly as I can.
